channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump names Massad Boulos, campaign liaison and family relative, as a senior adviser on Middle East
item.description: Donald Trump says Massad Boulos, a Lebanese American businessman who is the father-in-law of Trump’s daughter Tiffany, will be a senior adviser on Arab and Middle Eastern affairs.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The billionaires of Trump's proposed administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has a net worth of $5.7 billion, as of Dec. 1, 2024, and he has chosen a slew of fellow billionaires to serve in his second administration.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominates Kash Patel to lead FBI
item.description: President-elect Trump plans to nominate Kash Patel to serve as head of the FBI, elevating a staunch ally and controversial figure who sparked internal battles during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WFLA, NBC

item.title: China promises 'countermeasures' to US arms sale to Taiwan
item.description: Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te is defying China by traveling to the U.S. and entering into a $385 million arms deal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden's Thanksgiving holiday is part of a longer farewell as Trump's return to White House nears
item.description: NANTUCKET, Mass. (AP) — Joe Biden is wrapping up his final Thanksgiving holiday as president on Nantucket, a family tradition that this year seems to be part of a broader farewell to his time in the White House.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump taps Kash Patel for FBI director, an ally who would aid in his effort to upend law enforcement
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump says he will nominate Kash Patel to serve as FBI director, turning to a fierce ally to upend America’s premier law enforcement agency and rid the government of perceived “conspirators.”.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Alan Suderman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump boasts of 'very productive meeting' with Canadian PM Trudeau at Mar-a-Lago
item.description: President-elect Trump says he had a “very productive meeting" with Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau at his Mar-a-Lago club in West Palm Beach, Florida, on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on the BRIC bloc of nations if they act to undermine US dollar
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Saturday threatened 100% tariffs against a bloc of nine nations if they act to undermine the U.S. dollar.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Ranking the Democrats: Here's who the party could nominate next as president
item.description: Democrats are licking their wounds after Vice President Harris’s defeat to President-elect Trump, but already are looking toward who might lead their party in a 2028 presidential contest. It’s a fight that looks wide open.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesotans seek long-term contraception after Trump win, worry about abortion access
item.description: While Minnesota passed the PRO Act last year protecting abortion access statewide, residents say they are still worried what the upcoming Trump-Vance administration could do.
item.dc:creator: Sam Stroozas, MPR News

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: A spokesperson for Meta confirmed that Zuckerberg and Trump met on Wednesday, saying he was invited for dinner with the president-elect to talk about the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump dined on Wednesday with Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, bringing together the Facebook founder and the former president who was once banned from that social network.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Las Vegas Mayor Carolyn Goodman prepares to leave office, ending an era
item.description: Carolyn Goodman, who has served as Mayor of Las Vegas for 13 years, was honored with the renaming of Civic Plaza in her honor, and looks forward to the future with her husband Oscar.
item.dc:creator: John Langeler, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump names speechwriter Vince Haley as Domestic Policy Council chief
item.description: President-elect Trump announced on Tuesday night that Vince Haley, his campaign speechwriter, will be the next chief of the Domestic Policy Council (DPC). “As Director of the Domestic Policy Council, Vince will help make life better for ALL Americans, and unify our Country through SUCCESS.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Trump turns to critic of COVID mandates to run NIH
item.description: Dr. Jay Bhattacharya, a Stanford health researcher, is in line to lead the National Institutes of Health. Early in the pandemic he argued against lockdowns and focusing on people at highest risk.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein, MPR News

item.title: Mexico suggests it would impose its own tariffs to retaliate against any Trump tariffs
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — President Claudia Sheinbaum suggested Tuesday that Mexico could retaliate with tariffs of its own, after U.S. President-elect Donald Trump threatened to impose 25% import duties on Mexican goods if the country doesn’t stop the flow of drugs and migrants across the border.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: President Trump endorses Patronis & Fine for congressional seats
item.description: Two Florida leaders are already emerging as potential frontrunners to replace Former Congressman Matt Gaetz and current U.S. Representative Mike Waltz in D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Republicans to challenge election result in Shakopee House race in court
item.description: After a recount upheld a DFL candidate’s narrow win, the outcome moves next to the courts for a race that would determine whether the Minnesota House is in GOP hands or tied next year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Israel, Lebanon's Hezbollah agree to a ceasefire to end nearly 14 months of fighting
item.description: Israel approved a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah on Tuesday, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump is promising big cuts. Impoundment is one axe he wants to wield
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump wants to roll back spending that Congress has already approved. But a 1974 law may stand in his way.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota House recounts keep two DFLers in the lead, court challenge likely
item.description: Officials in two counties revisited results in close House races on Monday after experiencing vote reporting issues after Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters and Kirsti Marohn, MPR News

item.title: Jessica Tisch to become 2nd woman to lead NYPD
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Sanitation Commissioner Jessica Tisch became the top cop in New York City on Monday. She's the second woman to ever be the NYPD commissioner.
item.dc:creator: Kala Rama, PIX 11
